error_signature: no output from the update row in Google Sheet node
title: Google Sheet node not outputting data
symptom: The Google Sheet node runs without errors but does not output any data to the sheet. The workflow completes normally, but the expected updates are missing.
not_this_if: Error message is displayed during execution
Data is outputted in other nodes
root_cause: The issue arises from improperly structured input data for the Google Sheet node. If the input data does not match the expected format, the node may execute without errors but fail to produce the desired output.
fix_steps: Edit the input data structure in the Google Sheet node
Ensure the fields are correctly referenced, e.g., 'first_name', 'email', 'organization_name'
agent_instruction: Correct the input data structure in the Google Sheet node and save the workflow.
